decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. It aims to slow down the opponent's progression while slowly building up its own resources and setting up win conditions. The deck includes a variety of versatile spells that can handle different types of threats, along with powerful planeswalkers like Teferi and Tamiyo to generate additional card advantage and control the game. Atraxa, Grand Unifier serves as the commander to provide additional value and flexibility with proliferate, allowing the deck to take control of the game and outvalue the opponent in the long run.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and card advantage. Atraxa, Grand Unifier serves as the commander, providing access to multiple colors and synergizing with various cards in the deck. The deck includes a mix of versatile spells like Counterspell, Cryptic Command, and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt opponents' strategies while also running powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler to generate card advantage and provide additional control elements. The deck aims to outvalue opponents over the long game, using efficient removal and countermagic to answer threats while gradually pulling ahead in resources to secure a win.

The deck focuses on utilizing ramp cards to quickly play powerful creatures and control the board with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Flame Slash. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Endurance, Frenzied Baloth, and Primeval Titan. The mana base is optimized to ensure consistency and speed in casting spells, with a mix of fetch lands, dual lands, and mana dorks. The inclusion of cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Roxanne, Starfall Savant provide additional value and versatility to deal with a variety of threats. Overall, the deck seeks to establish early board presence and maintain pressure on the opponent to secure a quick victory.

The key strategy of this deck is to aggressively control the game using a combination of efficient creatures, burn spells, and disruptive counterspells while leveraging the unique abilities of Spider-Man 2099 as the commander. With a focus on tempo and pressure, the deck aims to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan with a variety of instant-speed spells and impactful creatures. By combining aggression with disruptive elements, the deck seeks to dictate the pace of the game and close out matches quickly before the opponent can stabilize or recover. The inclusion of powerful cards like True-Name Nemesis, Snapcaster Mage, and Cryptic Command further amplifies the deck's ability to control the battlefield and secure victory.

This deck revolves around utilizing Arwen, Mortal Queen as the commander to establish a strong aggro strategy. The deck includes a mix of powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk, Frenzied Baloth, and Skyclave Apparition, along with cards like Avacyn's Pilgrim, Elvish Mystic, and Wild Growth to ramp up mana production.
Additionally, the deck features control elements such as Archon of Emeria, Drannith Magistrate, and Sanctifier en-Vec to disrupt opponents' strategies. The inclusion of cards like Path to Exile, Swords to Plowshares, and Parallax Wave also helps in dealing with threats effectively. Overall, this deck aims to establish board presence quickly, disrupt opponents' strategies, and maintain pressure to secure victories in 1 vs 1 matches.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful combo using the commander, Sidisi, Undead Vizier, to tutor for key pieces and set up devastating plays. The deck is packed with removal, disruption, and card advantage spells to control the board and protect the combo. It also utilizes cards like Dark Petition and Profane Tutor to find the combo pieces quickly. The strategy revolves around assembling the necessary cards to win the game in a single turn, either by generating a massive amount of mana with Cabal Coffers and Bubbling Muck or by using powerful spells like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to dominate the battlefield.

The deck revolves around utilizing the Partner commanders Thrasios, Triton Hero and Tymna the Weaver to create a fast-paced aggro strategy. The goal is to quickly establish board presence with mana dorks and efficient creatures, while also disrupting opponents with removal spells and controlling effects. The deck is built to have a versatile toolbox of cards, enabling it to adapt to different matchups and situations. With a focus on ramp, card draw, and creature recursion, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless stream of threats and disruption. By leveraging the Partner mechanic and a diverse array of powerful cards, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and powerful combat tricks to overwhelm opponents quickly. The use of partner commanders allows for flexibility and increased card advantage. By combining white, red, and blue cards, the deck is able to control the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Lightning Bolt, while also ramping up with efficient creatures like Adeline, Resplendent Cathar and Kari Zev, Skyship Raider. The inclusion of equipment like Embercleave and Skullclamp enhances the deck's aggressiveness and provides additional ways to push through damage. Overall, the deck aims to be fast and aggressive, quickly closing out games before opponents have a chance to stabilize.
